introduction: SYNOPSISFlap is an L.A. gangster who comes back to Korea. He checks out the local night club with his friend Wawa. He experiences a string of one night stands and becomes friends with movie actor Seung-hwan. When Flap runs out of cash, he gets involved in a get-rich-quick scheme only to be beaten up by thugs. Seung-hwan meets and falls in love with Young-joo and vows to keep a steady relation with her. But when Young-joo returns to her wild ways, he takes revenge by trying to hurt her with other women. Their meaningless relationships continue.故事盖和前洛杉矶黑帮的国家。与初中华参观新一代的夜总会。有我在那里遇到了女性的关系，能够轻易满足几个女人盖更进一步潜水衣说，与女演员seunghwan生活。通过浪子生活yuheungbi重复盖是关闭的，但会偏转投注消灭马赚50000000韩元，并且通常由团伙殴打。Seunghwan爱上领主和满足预订。现在，他承诺seunghwan爱是祈祷和0股最后胜利的爱，他会完成快速的方式。但王子是不是找感觉满意seunghwan再次夜总会。愤怒的seunghwan还宣布与另一名女子对业主的关系，伤害了彼此的心。Bateumyeonseodo伤害，我们不应该再继续满足另外的含义。
